details.IncidentDetail: "[42] 1039 CF ST HELENA // WILL ADV 10-20 PTY IS XPORTED TO ONCE KNOWN"
"[40] 7-S TURNED AROUND AND GOING BACK TO HWY // UNABLE TO CONTINUE ON CURRENT ROAD DUE TO UNSAFE RDWY AND WASHOUTS"

"[39] 1039 CF ST HELENA // ADV LOTS OF RDWY WASHED OUT FROM 7-S CURRENT 10-20 // CF ENGINE HAD TO GO TO KEYGAN RANCH HOUSE AND PARK // WENT IN ON SIDE BY SIDE W/ COULUSA FIRE // ADV THERE IS A WASHOUT ON BARTLETT SPRINGS UNK 10-20 // POSS ACCESSIBLE FROM HIGH VALLEY RD FROM LUCERNE // CAN CB W/ BETTER ACCESS FROM CHIEF"
"[38] 7-S UNK IF ABLE TO CONTINUE DUE TO WEATHER // TIRES LIKELY TO GET STUCK // REQ POINT OF ENTRY FROM RP"
"[36] 1039 CF ST HELENA // 1097 // CHIEF CALLING COAST GUARD TO COODINATE 1141 HELO // NEG ETA // WILL CB IF MORE INFO RECEIVED"
"[35] 1039 CF ST HELENA // ADV WILL CB"
"[34] 1039 CF ST HELENA // 10-97 WILL GET A REPORT ON CONDITIONS"
"[26] HUBXFER TO GGCC // REQ HELO LN 24"
"[24] [Notification] [CHP]-PER CF / REQ HELO FROM CHP // 22 YOA PATIENT XRAY 24 YOA MALE / ATV ACCIDENT / MALE P/U OF RIVER WITH BO LEG / XRAY HEAD INJ / AIR 1141 DENIED DUE TO WEATHER THROUGH CF"
"[21] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt by CHP"
"[18] 1039 CALFIRE ST HELENA // SAYS CHP WILL BE NEEDED"
"[17] 7-N INQ W/ CALFIRE WHEN THEY GO 10-97 AND ADV IF CHP NEEDED // POSS PEND THE VEH FOR DAYSHIFT"

"[15] [Notification] [CHP]-LCSO RECIEVED ANOTHER TEXT 911 / CALL XFERED TO CALFIRE / VEH DOWN CLIFFSIDE / OCCUPIED BY MALE AND XRAY W/ INJ, 1 W/ HEAD WOUND, OTHER W/ LEG INJ / I/O CONCIOUSNESS / RP WAS REQ HELO"
"[14] [Notification] [CHP]-PER CF / REC TEXT TO 911 XRAY AND MALE INVLD / ONE LOSING CONSCIOUSNESS OPEN HEAD LACERATION / REQ CHP RESP"
"[13] 1039 CALFIRE ST HELENA // WILL BE ENRT"
"[11] 7-N PER S3 REQ FIRE TO RESPOND // CAN BE ENRT ONCE FIRE ADVISES NEED"
"[8] CORRECTION TO LN 6 UNK INJ UNK VEH DESCRIPT"
"[7] FASTEST WAY FOR UNITS TO RESP IS THROUGH BEAR VALLEY RD "
"[6] LAKE CO SO ADV AUTOMATED TRAFFIC UNK COLLISION UNK VEH "
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 911 Hang up to 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj by CHP"
"[24] RP ADV SHE IS GOING TO DIRECT TRAFFIC // FORMER LE -- [Shared]"
"[2] DRIVER OF GRY NISS PTH IS TRAPPED IN VEH / CANT GET MOM OO VEH"
